return(function(l,n,p,z,G,M,b,a,C,e,Q,H,X,u,x,I,Z,r,s,h,E,T,m)T,u,a,e,r,s,H,Z,m,C,I,Q,h,E,X,x=function(l,q)local n=e(q)local p=function(...)return s(l,{...},q,n)end return p end,function(l,q)local n=e(q)local p=function(p)return s(l,{p},q,n)end return p end,function(l)r[l]=r[l]-(-144540+144541)if r[l]==-51764+51764 then r[l],h[l]=nil,nil end end,function(l)for q=296203+-296202,#l,465901-465900 s(l,{p;z;G},q,n)end return p end,function(l)local q,s=835200+-835199,l[-259925+259926]while s do r[s],q=r[s]-(638434+-638433),(-543863+543864)+q if r[s]==640315+-640315 then r[s],h[s]=nil,nil end table[q(-238446-(-281089))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
